prompt: Create an extreme close-up editorial beauty portrait of a pale porcelain-skinned woman with ash blonde and brunette highlighted tousled hair falling across her forehead and cheeks, shown from forehead to chin in a tight vertical crop. Her face is slightly tilted, with one large eye near the upper right and the other eye lower left, both staring intensely at the viewer. Give her oversized glossy blue-gray irises filled with crystalline, kaleidoscopic reflections, dramatic black smoky eye makeup, long thick spidery lashes, sharp eyeliner, and a small beauty mark under the outer corner of the right eye. Her lips are full, parted slightly, and covered in deep black cherry glossy lipstick. A single transparent iridescent glass dagger or shard crosses diagonally across the face from upper left to lower right, passing over the nose and between the eyes, refracting rainbow colors like oil slicks and prism light. Use mostly desaturated graphite-gray skin tones and hair, with the glass shard and eyes providing vivid holographic blues, purples, oranges, greens, and pinks. Style it as hyperrealistic fashion photography mixed with surreal gothic doll beauty, extremely detailed skin texture, wet gloss highlights, fine individual hair strands, high contrast, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, no text, no background distractions, vertical portrait composition.
